_comment: Back-Road Creative's internal rigscore config — safe to copy as a template and adapt to your own conventions.

allowGovernanceContradictions.title: Allow list permits sudo-u-dev-git which governance forbids
allowGovernanceContradictions.detail: settings.json allow list contains a sudo -u dev git entry, but governance explicitly forbids this operation.
allowGovernanceContradictions.remediation: Remove the sudo -u dev git allow-list entry and use git as the human owner directly.

allowGovernanceContradictions.title: Allow list permits pip install which governance restricts to a wrapper
allowGovernanceContradictions.detail: settings.json allow list contains pip install, but governance restricts installs to a project-specific wrapper.
allowGovernanceContradictions.remediation: Remove the pip install allow-list entry and use the configured wrapper instead.

finding.title: Skill unaware of merge workflow restrictions
finding.detail: Governance requires merges via gh-merge-approved/brc-merge-approved (manual hand-off), but this skill handles git/shipping operations without mentioning the constraint.
finding.remediation: Add merge workflow awareness: 'Merge is manual via gh-merge-approved. Print PR URL and merge command for the user.'

finding.title: Skill unaware of layer write restrictions
finding.detail: Governance restricts writes to _governance/ and _foundation/ (require explicit session-local approval), but this skill performs write operations without mentioning layer restrictions.
finding.remediation: Add layer awareness: '_governance/ and _foundation/ require explicit session-local human approval before modification.'

finding.title: Skill does not mention WIP protection
finding.detail: Governance requires reading existing files before overwriting in _active/svc-* (untracked files have no backup), but this skill performs write operations without mentioning the precaution.
finding.remediation: Add WIP protection note: 'Before overwriting files in _active/svc-*, read them first — untracked files have no backup.'

finding.title: Skill does not mention branch protection
finding.detail: Governance prohibits direct push to main/master and force push, but this skill handles git operations without mentioning branch protection.
finding.remediation: Add branch protection note: 'Always create a feature branch. No force push. No direct push to main/master.'

hookSettingsConflicts.title: Hook blocks sops-get but settings allows it
hookSettingsConflicts.detail: PreToolUse hook hard-blocks all sops-get commands, but settings allow-list permits specific sops-get invocations. The hook always wins, making the allow entry dead code.
hookSettingsConflicts.remediation: Remove sops-get from the PreToolUse hook ALWAYS_BLOCK list, or remove the dead allow entry from settings.

hookSettingsConflicts.title: Hook blocks gh-merge-approved but settings allows it
hookSettingsConflicts.detail: PreToolUse hook hard-blocks gh-merge-approved (intentionally keeping merges manual), but settings allow-list has a matching entry. The allow entry is dead code.
hookSettingsConflicts.remediation: Remove the dead gh-merge-approved allow entry from settings, since the hook intentionally blocks it.
